subject: Fw: Fwd: For JE
body:
Sent via BlackBerry by AT&T

-----Original Message-----
From: OSSA1@aol.com

Date: Thu, 26 Jun 2008 13:36:32 
To:nadja2102@yahoo.com
Subject: Fwd: For JE


Nadja, 
  
thanks for the follow up, 
  
Please forward to Jeffrey 
  
Anthony




----------------
Gas prices getting you down? Search AOL Autos for fuel-efficient used cars <http://autos.aol.com/used?ncid=aolaut00050000000007> .

From: OSSA1@aol.com
Subject: For JE
Date: Wed, 25 Jun 2008 19:50:21 GMT
To: lesley@nysgllc.com

Hi Jeffrey,
 
I just spoke to Nadja who gave me the news.  I would like to see  you but I 
understand that you have many important issues to take care of.   I would just 
like to say that I will always remember the opportunities you have  given me 
and my family and know exactly the caring, thoughtful and generous  person you 
are.  I will never forget.  If there is anything you need  taken care of or 
any help with anything I am available for you anytime.
 
Best wishes and thoughts 
 
Anthony

fuel-efficient used cars.      (http://autos.aol.com/used?ncid=aolaut00050000000007)
